name: extreme_spy_today_far_from_neighbors
description: spy_today_return is far from every historical SPY return; neighbors are still selected, but current_symphony_return is large relative to simulation distribution. Exercises the searchsorted/below_count tail of the distribution. Captures the documented behavior where the probability collapses to 0.0 when current return dominates the sim distribution.
derivation: Re-captured from the fixed producer at branch fix/mc-knn-exit-gate HEAD c3834d0 (Cluster 2) with run_monte_carlo(..., seed=42). num_days raised from 30 to 50: under Ruling 2 (AC-4 eligible-pool sufficiency) a 30-day raw history is now eligible-insufficient (30 - (MC_VOL_WINDOW_DAYS-1) = 11 eligible < MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS); 50 raw days keeps this fixture on the real MC path it is designed to exercise (the extreme-spy_today searchsorted tail). current_symphony_return = 0.01 * 100.0 * 1.0 = 1.0 lies above the entire low-amplitude sim distribution => below_count = simulation_paths => prob = 0.0 (a deterministic boundary result). Provenance: captured-from-the-fixed-producer.
